device_name: Micro C Medical Imaging System, M01
intended_use: The Micro C Medical Imaging System, M01 is a handheld and portable general purpose X-ray system that is indicated for use by qualified/trained clinicians on adult and pediatric patients for taking dia
intended_use_full: The Micro C Medical Imaging System, M01 is a handheld and portable general purpose X-ray system that is indicated for use by qualified/trained clinicians on adult and pediatric patients for taking diagnostic static and serial radiographic exposures of extremities.
target_condition: Extremity radiography (ankle, elbow, hand, foot, knee, toe, wrist)
ground_truth: Board certified radiologists and orthopedic surgeon review of phantom validation images; Diagnostic Reference Levels (DRLs) from literature for dose evaluation
other_metrics: Mean Squared Error and Mean Absolute Error reported for algorithm training/verification; all phantom validation images determined to be diagnostically and clinically relevant by board certified radiologists and orthopedic surgeon; radiation dose testing showed all AiLARA dose values below established Diagnostic Reference Levels (DRLs) with no statistical difference compared to manual mode; usability evaluation: 100% of 15 participants completed all critical use tasks with passing results.
